title: How to Build a Minimal ZFS NAS Without Synology, QNAP, TrueNAS (2024)
summary: This guide explains how to build a minimal ZFS-based NAS without using pre-built solutions like Synology, QNAP, or TrueNAS. It covers manual setup of ZFS on Linux, including disk configuration, sharing via NFS/SMB, and basic management. The article targets users seeking a lightweight, DIY approach to network storage.
